notes: Direct outreach to CTO at Anglo American
draft_email:
Subject: Anglo American - AI Solutions for Mining Operations

Hi CTO,

I noticed Anglo American is actively investing in technology and innovation.

I'm Mahlo Kgotleng, founder of Kgotla AI. We specialize in AI-driven solutions for mining operations—specifically addressing unplanned equipment downtime and safety incidents costing millions.

Recent wins:
• Reduced equipment downtime by 35% for a mining client using predictive maintenance AI
• Automated compliance reporting saving 200+ hours/month for a power utility
• Built intelligent safety monitoring reducing incidents by 40%

I'd love to explore how we can deliver similar results for Anglo American. 

Worth a 15-minute call this week?

Best,
Mahlo Kgotleng
Founder, Kgotla AI
https://www.linkedin.com/in/mahlo-kgotleng-473830194
P.S. We're currently offering 50% equity partnerships for Enterprise Development—happy to share details.
